Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Motion Planning for a Humanoid Mobile Manipulator System
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 摘要表明研究仅基于大量仿真验证，缺乏真实机器人硬件实验数据支撑，工程落地性尚待确认；虽宣称实现‘类人’交互，但本质仍为基于规则的姿态分配而非高层语义理解，泛化能力存疑；复合系统的冗余规划难度较大，需关注其计算实时性在硬件上的表现。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Motion Planning for a Humanoid Mobile Manipulator System 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Yan Wei, Wei Jiang, Ahmed Rahmani, Qiang Zhan 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2018-06-19 17:02:30 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/1806.07349v1 🧾 一句话总结： 本研究提出了一种集成离线在线规划与人机交互导向的人形移动双机械臂系统运动规划框架，通过多目标优化解决了冗余耦合与路径效率问题。 📄 摘要： A high redundant non-holonomic humanoid mobile dual-arm manipulator system is presented in this paper where the motion planning to realize "human-like" autonomous navigation and manipulation tasks is studied. Firstly, an improved MaxiMin NSGA-II algorithm, which optimizes five objective functions to solve the problems of singularity, redundancy, and coupling between mobile base and manipulator simultaneously, is proposed to design the optimal pose to manipulate the target object. Then, in order to link the initial pose and that optimal pose, an off-line motion planning algorithm is designed. In detail, an efficient direct-connect bidirectional RRT and gradient descent algorithm is proposed to reduce the sampled nodes largely, and a geometric optimization method is proposed for path pruning. Besides, head forward behaviors are realized by calculating the reasonable orientations and assigning them to the mobile base to improve the quality of human-robot interaction. Thirdly, the extension to on-line planning is done by introducing real-time sensing, collision-test and control cycles to update robotic motion in dynamic environments. Fourthly, an EEs' via-point-based multi-objective genetic algorithm is proposed to design the "human-like" via-poses by optimizing four objective functions. Finally, numerous simulations are presented to validate the effectiveness of proposed algorithms. 🧠 核心术语库 [[高冗余非完整约束系统]] [[多目标遗传算法 (NSGA-II)]] [[双向 RRT 路径规划]] [[类人通过姿态]] [[移动基座朝向分配]] 🔬 核心方法简述 采用改进型 MaxiMin NSGA-II 算法优化底盘与机械臂耦合位姿，解决冗余与奇异性；构建直接连接双向 RRT 结合梯度下降与几何剪枝的离线路径规划器；引入实时感知与碰撞检测扩展至在线动态规划；通过末端执行器航点多目标遗传算法生成拟人化中间姿态，并结合头部朝向优化提升人机交互质量。 💬 锐评 摘要表明研究仅基于大量仿真验证，缺乏真实机器人硬件实验数据支撑，工程落地性尚待确认；虽宣称实现‘类人’交互，但本质仍为基于规则的姿态分配而非高层语义理解，泛化能力存疑；复合系统的冗余规划难度较大，需关注其计算实时性在硬件上的表现。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Humanoid Loco-manipulation Planning based on Graph Search and Reachability Maps
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 作为 Letter 类短文，其工程落地细节披露有限。依赖可达性映射虽提升了计算效率，但将复杂的全身动力学简化为离散状态转移可能导致局部最优解风险，且单案例（梭子滚动）不足以证明在多变接触力下的鲁棒性。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Humanoid Loco-manipulation Planning based on Graph Search and Reachability Maps 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Masaki Murooka, Iori Kumagai, Mitsuharu Morisawa, Fumio Kanehiro, Abderrahmane Kheddar 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-05-29 14:48:25 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.23505v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该方法通过动态可达性映射优化图搜索，实现了人形机器人自主搬运物体时行走与抓取动作的高效序列规划。 📄 摘要： In this letter, we propose an efficient and highly versatile loco-manipulation planning for humanoid robots. Loco-manipulation planning is a key technological brick enabling humanoid robots to autonomously perform object transportation by manipulating them. We formulate planning of the alternation and sequencing of footsteps and grasps as a graph search problem with a new transition model that allows for a flexible representation of loco-manipulation. Our transition model is quickly evaluated by relocating and switching the reachability maps depending on the motion of both the robot and object. We evaluate our approach by applying it to loco-manipulation use-cases, such as a bobbin rolling operation with regrasping, where the motion is automatically planned by our framework. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Loco-manipulation Planning]] [[Graph Search]] [[Reachability Maps]] [[Transition Model]] [[Footsteps and Grasps Sequencing]] 🔬 核心方法简述 将人形机器人移动与操纵任务的交替与排序建模为图搜索问题，设计新型过渡模型以灵活表示运动；通过根据机器人和物体运动动态切换和重定位可达性映射，实现过渡模型的快速评估。 💬 锐评 作为 Letter 类短文，其工程落地细节披露有限。依赖可达性映射虽提升了计算效率，但将复杂的全身动力学简化为离散状态转移可能导致局部最优解风险，且单案例（梭子滚动）不足以证明在多变接触力下的鲁棒性。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: ARDOP: A Versatile Humanoid Robotic Research Platform
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 在当前无历史基准下，该平台提供了宝贵的硬件基线与实验环境，但摘要仅陈述设计思路而缺乏关键性能指标（如抓握精度、平衡恢复时间），建议重点关注其开放架构的扩展潜力而非即插即用的智能水平
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: ARDOP: A Versatile Humanoid Robotic Research Platform 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Sudarshan S Harithas, Harish V Mekali 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2021-08-18 05:55:13 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2108.07983v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该文介绍了一款面向研究与操作的模块化开源低成本人形机器人平台及其设计验证 📄 摘要： This paper describes the development of a humanoid robot called ARDOP. The goal of the project is to provide a modular, open-source, and inexpensive humanoid robot that would enable researchers to answer various problems related to robotic manipulation and perception. ARDOP primarily comprises of two functional units namely the perception and manipulation system, here we discuss the conceptualization and design methodology of these systems and proceed to present their performance results on simulation and various custom-designed experiments. 🧠 核心术语库 [[人形机器人]] [[模块化设计]] [[开源平台]] [[低成本]] [[感知系统]] [[操作任务]] 🔬 核心方法简述 采用模块化设计理念，整合感知与操作两大功能单元，构建开源低成本人形机器人系统，并通过仿真及定制实验验证系统性能 💬 锐评 在当前无历史基准下，该平台提供了宝贵的硬件基线与实验环境，但摘要仅陈述设计思路而缺乏关键性能指标（如抓握精度、平衡恢复时间），建议重点关注其开放架构的扩展潜力而非即插即用的智能水平 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作在数据效率与实机落地方面表现突出，但'单次演示'泛化十项任务的成功率依赖于合成数据的分布广度与仿真模型的保真度，摘要未明确说明面对非典型空间变化或动力学扰动时的失效边界，需进一步评估其在开放场景下的长尾风险。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: DemoHLM: From One Demonstration to Generalizable Humanoid Loco-Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Yuhui Fu, Feiyang Xie, Chaoyi Xu, Jing Xiong, Haoqi Yuan, Zongqing Lu 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-10-13 10:49:40 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.11258v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过单演示模仿学习与层级控制架构，实现了人形机器人在真实环境中高效且可泛化的移动操作任务。 📄 摘要： Loco-manipulation is a fundamental challenge for humanoid robots to achieve versatile interactions in human environments. Although recent studies have made significant progress in humanoid whole-body control, loco-manipulation remains underexplored and often relies on hard-coded task definitions or costly real-world data collection, which limits autonomy and generalization. We present DemoHLM, a framework for humanoid loco-manipulation that enables generalizable loco-manipulation on a real humanoid robot from a single demonstration in simulation. DemoHLM adopts a hierarchy that integrates a low-level universal whole-body controller with high-level manipulation policies for multiple tasks. The whole-body controller maps whole-body motion commands to joint torques and provides omnidirectional mobility for the humanoid robot. The manipulation policies, learned in simulation via our data generation and imitation learning pipeline, command the whole-body controller with closed-loop visual feedback to execute challenging loco-manipulation tasks. Experiments show a positive correlation between the amount of synthetic data and policy performance, underscoring the effectiveness of our data generation pipeline and the data efficiency of our approach. Real-world experiments on a Unitree G1 robot equipped with an RGB-D camera validate the sim-to-real transferability of DemoHLM, demonstrating robust performance under spatial variations across ten loco-manipulation tasks. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Loco-manipulation]] [[Single Demonstration]] [[Sim-to-Real Transfer]] [[Whole-body Controller]] [[Imitation Learning]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出层级化框架，底层部署通用全身控制器映射关节力矩并提供全向移动能力，高层操作策略在仿真中通过数据生成与模仿学习训练，仅需单次演示配合闭环视觉反馈即可指挥底层控制器完成多样化任务，并在真实Unitree G1机器人上验证了仿真到现实的迁移能力。 💬 锐评 该工作在数据效率与实机落地方面表现突出，但'单次演示'泛化十项任务的成功率依赖于合成数据的分布广度与仿真模型的保真度，摘要未明确说明面对非典型空间变化或动力学扰动时的失效边界，需进一步评估其在开放场景下的长尾风险。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Integrative Wrapping System for a Dual-Arm Humanoid Robot
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 相比当前流行的端到端学习与Sim-to-Real方案，该研究采用更传统的感知 - 规划 - 控制架构；虽然填补了连续多步操作的空白，但依赖人工编码特性信息的泛化能力存疑，且阻抗控制在复杂柔性形变下的张力维持难度极大，需关注其实验鲁棒性。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Integrative Wrapping System for a Dual-Arm Humanoid Robot 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Yukina Iwata, Shun Hasegawa, Kento Kawaharazuka, Kei Okada, Masayuki Inaba 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2024-11-13 07:22:03 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.08389v1 🧾 一句话总结： 提出一套集成化的双臂人形机器人柔性包裹系统，通过阻抗控制与点云感知实现多步骤连续操作，有效解决了传统单一动作研究的局限性。 📄 摘要： Flexible object manipulation of paper and cloth is a major research challenge in robot manipulation. Although there have been efforts to develop hardware that enables specific actions and to realize a single action of paper folding using sim-to-real and learning, there have been few proposals for humanoid robots and systems that enable continuous, multi-step actions of flexible materials. Wrapping an object with paper and tape is more complex and diverse than traditional manipulation research due to the increased number of objects that need to be handled, as well as the three-dimensionality of the operation. In this research, necessary information is organized and coded based on the characteristics of each object handled in wrapping. We also generalize the hardware configuration, manipulation method, and recognition system that enable humanoid wrapping operations. The system will include manipulation with admittance control focusing on paper tension and state evaluation using point clouds to handle three-dimensional flexible objects. Finally, wrapping objects with different shapes is experimented with to show the generality and effectiveness of the proposed system. 🧠 核心术语库 [[柔性对象操作]] [[双臂人形机器人]] [[阻抗控制]] [[点云状态评估]] [[连续多步动作]] 🔬 核心方法简述 基于物体特性进行信息编码组织，构建通用化的硬件配置、识别与操控系统；采用以纸张张力为核心的阻抗控制结合点云状态评估，解决三维柔性对象的连续多步操作问题。 💬 锐评 相比当前流行的端到端学习与Sim-to-Real方案，该研究采用更传统的感知 - 规划 - 控制架构；虽然填补了连续多步操作的空白，但依赖人工编码特性信息的泛化能力存疑，且阻抗控制在复杂柔性形变下的张力维持难度极大，需关注其实验鲁棒性。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Task and Motion Planning for Humanoid Loco-manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 摘要强调“基于优化”与“长行动序列”，虽展示了生成物理一致行为的潜力，但未阐明优化求解的时间复杂度及对状态扰动的鲁棒性。“全非循环规划”的创新表述意味着避免了图搜索中的闭环冗余，但在面对突发干扰时的重规划灵活性仍需考量。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Task and Motion Planning for Humanoid Loco-manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Michal Ciebielski, Victor Dhédin, Majid Khadiv 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-08-16 06:45:32 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.14099v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该方法通过接触模态共享表征，首次实现了兼顾全身动力学与作动约束的人形机长序列移物任务统一规划。 📄 摘要： This work presents an optimization-based task and motion planning (TAMP) framework that unifies planning for locomotion and manipulation through a shared representation of contact modes. We define symbolic actions as contact mode changes, grounding high-level planning in low-level motion. This enables a unified search that spans task, contact, and motion planning while incorporating whole-body dynamics, as well as all constraints between the robot, the manipulated object, and the environment. Results on a humanoid platform show that our method can generate a broad range of physically consistent loco-manipulation behaviors over long action sequences requiring complex reasoning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that enables the resolution of an integrated TAMP formulation with fully acyclic planning and whole body dynamics with actuation constraints for the humanoid loco-manipulation problem. 🧠 核心术语库 [[任务与运动规划 (TAMP)]] [[接触模态表示]] [[全身动力学]] [[全非循环规划]] [[人形移动操作]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出基于优化的任务与运动规划（TAMP）框架，通过共享接触模态表示统一足部移动与手部操作规划。定义符号动作为接触模式变化，将规划问题转化为包含全身动力学及机器人-物体-环境约束的统一搜索空间，实现任务、接触与运动层级的协同求解。 💬 锐评 摘要强调“基于优化”与“长行动序列”，虽展示了生成物理一致行为的潜力，但未阐明优化求解的时间复杂度及对状态扰动的鲁棒性。“全非循环规划”的创新表述意味着避免了图搜索中的闭环冗余，但在面对突发干扰时的重规划灵活性仍需考量。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: CHILD (Controller for Humanoid Imitation and Live Demonstration): a Whole-Body Humanoid Teleoperation System
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作针对现有系统缺乏人形机器人全身关节级控制的痛点，提供了低成本的便携化解决方案并开源硬件设计，具有较高工程复现价值。但摘要未披露控制延迟、映射精度量化指标及复杂动态任务下的安全性验证数据，且‘婴儿背带’形态可能对人机交互的长时间稳定性存在挑战。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: CHILD (Controller for Humanoid Imitation and Live Demonstration): a Whole-Body Humanoid Teleoperation System 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Noboru Myers, Obin Kwon, Sankalp Yamsani, Joohyung Kim 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-07-31 21:08:15 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.00162v2 🧾 一句话总结： 一款支持四肢关节级控制的便携式人形机器人全身遥操作系统及开源方案。 📄 摘要： Recent advances in teleoperation have demonstrated robots performing complex manipulation tasks. However, existing works rarely support whole-body joint-level teleoperation for humanoid robots, limiting the diversity of tasks that can be accomplished. This work presents Controller for Humanoid Imitation and Live Demonstration (CHILD), a compact reconfigurable teleoperation system that enables joint level control over humanoid robots. CHILD fits within a standard baby carrier, allowing the operator control over all four limbs, and supports both direct joint mapping for full-body control and loco-manipulation. Adaptive force feedback is incorporated to enhance operator experience and prevent unsafe joint movements. We validate the capabilities of this system by conducting loco-manipulation and full-body control demonstrations on a humanoid robot and multiple dual-arm systems. Lastly, we open-source the design of the hardware promoting accessibility and reproducibility. Additional details and open-source information are available at our project website: https://uiuckimlab.github.io/CHILD-pages. 🧠 核心术语库 [[全身遥操作]] [[关节级控制]] [[自适应力反馈]] [[移动操作]] [[开源硬件]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出一种紧凑可重构的人形机器人遥操作硬件系统（CHILD），采用标准婴儿背带形式佩戴，实现四肢关节级直接映射控制与移动操作；集成自适应力反馈机制以增强操作体验并防止关节运动超限，并通过多机器人平台验证了全身体控能力。 💬 锐评 该工作针对现有系统缺乏人形机器人全身关节级控制的痛点，提供了低成本的便携化解决方案并开源硬件设计，具有较高工程复现价值。但摘要未披露控制延迟、映射精度量化指标及复杂动态任务下的安全性验证数据，且‘婴儿背带’形态可能对人机交互的长时间稳定性存在挑战。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Humanoid Loco-Manipulations Pattern Generation and Stabilization Control
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该方法将复杂的外部交互力整合进经典的双足线性模型中，在计算效率上具有优势；然而，摘要暗示其依赖于参考力轨迹的一致性，对于未建模的高频非线性扰动或接触力突变可能缺乏足够的鲁棒性描述。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Humanoid Loco-Manipulations Pattern Generation and Stabilization Control 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Masaki Murooka, Kevin Chappellet, Arnaud Tanguy, Mehdi Benallegue, Iori Kumagai, Mitsuharu Morisawa, Fumio Kanehiro, Abderrahmane Kheddar 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-05-30 01:27:09 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24116v1 🧾 一句话总结： 提出一种考虑操作外力影响的双足控制策略，通过动态修正与稳定化补偿解决步行搬运中的稳定性问题。 📄 摘要： In order for a humanoid robot to perform loco-manipulation such as moving an object while walking, it is necessary to account for sustained or alternating external forces other than ground-feet reaction, resulting from humanoid-object contact interactions. In this letter, we propose a bipedal control strategy for humanoid loco-manipulation that can cope with such external forces. First, the basic formulas of the bipedal dynamics, i.e., linear inverted pendulum mode and divergent component of motion, are derived, taking into account the effects of external manipulation forces. Then, we propose a pattern generator to plan center of mass trajectories consistent with the reference trajectory of the manipulation forces, and a stabilizer to compensate for the error between desired and actual manipulation forces. The effectiveness of our controller is assessed both in simulation and loco-manipulation experiments with real humanoid robots. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Loco-Manipulation]] [[线性倒立摆模型(LIPM)]] [[发散分量运动(DCM)]] [[外部操作力]] [[质心轨迹规划]] [[稳定器]] 🔬 核心方法简述 基于考虑外部操作力的双足动力学（LIPM 和 DCM 扩展公式），设计质心轨迹模式发生器与力误差补偿稳定器，实现运动与操作的协同控制。 💬 锐评 该方法将复杂的外部交互力整合进经典的双足线性模型中，在计算效率上具有优势；然而，摘要暗示其依赖于参考力轨迹的一致性，对于未建模的高频非线性扰动或接触力突变可能缺乏足够的鲁棒性描述。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Humanoid Everyday: A Comprehensive Robotic Dataset for Open-World Humanoid Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 针对当前人形机器人领域缺乏全肢体动作、交互数据及统一基准测试的现状，该工作构建了首个结合大规模任务覆盖与云端标准评估的综合解决方案，填补了从数据采集到策略验证的闭环空白。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Humanoid Everyday: A Comprehensive Robotic Dataset for Open-World Humanoid Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Zhenyu Zhao, Hongyi Jing, Xiawei Liu, Jiageng Mao, Abha Jha, Hanwen Yang, Rong Xue, Sergey Zakharor, Vitor Guizilini, Yue Wang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-10-09 20:43:27 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.08807v1 🧾 一句话总结： 发布了一套涵盖全模态传感器数据与大规模开放任务的人形机器人数据集，并首创配套云端评估平台以推动通用操作智能体研究。 📄 摘要： From loco-motion to dextrous manipulation, humanoid robots have made remarkable strides in demonstrating complex full-body capabilities. However, the majority of current robot learning datasets and benchmarks mainly focus on stationary robot arms, and the few existing humanoid datasets are either confined to fixed environments or limited in task diversity, often lacking human-humanoid interaction and lower-body locomotion. Moreover, there are a few standardized evaluation platforms for benchmarking learning-based policies on humanoid data. In this work, we present Humanoid Everyday, a large-scale and diverse humanoid manipulation dataset characterized by extensive task variety involving dextrous object manipulation, human-humanoid interaction, locomotion-integrated actions, and more. Leveraging a highly efficient human-supervised teleoperation pipeline, Humanoid Everyday aggregates high-quality multimodal sensory data, including RGB, depth, LiDAR, and tactile inputs, together with natural language annotations, comprising 10.3k trajectories and over 3 million frames of data across 260 tasks across 7 broad categories. In addition, we conduct an analysis of representative policy learning methods on our dataset, providing insights into their strengths and limitations across different task categories. For standardized evaluation, we introduce a cloud-based evaluation platform that allows researchers to seamlessly deploy their policies in our controlled setting and receive performance feedback. By releasing Humanoid Everyday along with our policy learning analysis and a standardized cloud-based evaluation platform, we intend to advance research in general-purpose humanoid manipulation and lay the groundwork for more capable and embodied robotic agents in real-world scenarios. Our dataset, data collection code, and cloud evaluation website are made publicly available on our project website. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Humanoid Everyday 数据集]] [[人机协同遥操作]] [[多模态感官数据融合]] [[云端标准化评估平台]] [[开放世界人形操作]] 🔬 核心方法简述 通过高效的人机协同遥操作管线采集多模态数据（RGB、深度、LiDAR、触觉及自然语言），构建包含 10.3k 轨迹与 260 个任务的多样化数据集，并配套开发云端平台以实现策略的标准化部署与性能反馈。 💬 锐评 针对当前人形机器人领域缺乏全肢体动作、交互数据及统一基准测试的现状，该工作构建了首个结合大规模任务覆盖与云端标准评估的综合解决方案，填补了从数据采集到策略验证的闭环空白。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Humanoid Manipulation Interface: Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation from Robot-Free Demonstrations
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作直击人形机器人领域数据收集瓶颈（遥操作/奖励工程复杂），提出了无机器人演示的高效路径。但摘要未披露‘人类动作到机器人可行性’的具体约束处理机制，且 70% 未见环境成功率是否包含复杂物理交互细节仍需论文正文验证，迁移过程中的动力学兼容性是潜在风险点。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Humanoid Manipulation Interface: Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation from Robot-Free Demonstrations 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Ruiqian Nai, Boyuan Zheng, Junming Zhao, Haodong Zhu, Sicong Dai, Zunhao Chen, Yihang Hu, Yingdong Hu, Tong Zhang, Chuan Wen, Yang Gao 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-02-06 12:10:47 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.06643v2 🧾 一句话总结： 通过便携式数据采集与分层迁移学习，显著提升了人形机器人全身操作任务的数据效率与环境泛化能力。 📄 摘要： Current approaches for humanoid whole-body manipulation, primarily relying on teleoperation or visual sim-to-real reinforcement learning, are hindered by hardware logistics and complex reward engineering. Consequently, demonstrated autonomous skills remain limited and are typically restricted to controlled environments. In this paper, we present the Humanoid Manipulation Interface (HuMI), a portable and efficient framework for learning diverse whole-body manipulation tasks across various environments. HuMI enables robot-free data collection by capturing rich whole-body motion using portable hardware. This data drives a hierarchical learning pipeline that translates human motions into dexterous and feasible humanoid skills. Extensive experiments across five whole-body tasks--including kneeling, squatting, tossing, walking, and bimanual manipulation--demonstrate that HuMI achieves a 3x increase in data collection efficiency compared to teleoperation and attains a 70% success rate in unseen environments. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Humanoid Manipulation Interface (HuMI)]] [[Robot-Free Demonstrations]] [[Whole-Body Manipulation]] [[Hierarchical Learning Pipeline]] [[Teleoperation]] [[Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning]] [[Data Collection Efficiency]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 HuMI 框架，利用便携硬件采集人类全身运动数据（无需机器人），通过分层学习管线将人类动作映射为可行的人形机器人技能，实现高效的全能体操作学习。 💬 锐评 该工作直击人形机器人领域数据收集瓶颈（遥操作/奖励工程复杂），提出了无机器人演示的高效路径。但摘要未披露‘人类动作到机器人可行性’的具体约束处理机制，且 70% 未见环境成功率是否包含复杂物理交互细节仍需论文正文验证，迁移过程中的动力学兼容性是潜在风险点。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: DexEMG: Towards Dexterous Teleoperation System via EMG2Pose Generalization
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 摘要中宣称无需密集个体校准即具备跨物体/环境泛化能力存在技术挑战未解，sEMG 信号易受干扰且存在通道漂移问题，文中未详述如何保证非实验室环境下信号稳定性的具体机制
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: DexEMG: Towards Dexterous Teleoperation System via EMG2Pose Generalization 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Qianyou Zhao, Wenqiao Li, Chiyu Wang, Kaifeng Zhang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-06 03:36:33 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.05861v1 🧾 一句话总结： 构建了一种低成本轻量级 sEMG 遥操作系统，通过神经拟态预测与重映射算法突破现有视觉或外骨骼方案的性能与便携性权衡瓶颈 📄 摘要： High-fidelity teleoperation of dexterous robotic hands is essential for bringing robots into unstructured domestic environments. However, existing teleoperation systems often face a trade-off between performance and portability: vision-based capture systems are constrained by costs and line-of-sight requirements, while mechanical exoskeletons are bulky and physically restrictive. In this paper, we present DexEMG, a lightweight and cost-effective teleoperation system leveraging surface electromyography (sEMG) to bridge the gap between human intent and robotic execution. We first collect a synchronized dataset of sEMG signals and hand poses via a MoCap glove to train EMG2Pose, a neural network capable of continuously predicting hand kinematics directly from muscle activity. To ensure seamless control, we develop a robust hand retargeting algorithm that maps the predicted poses onto a multi-fingered dexterous hand in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that DexEMG achieves high precision in diverse teleoperation tasks. Notably, our system exhibits strong generalization capabilities across novel objects and complex environments without the need for intensive individual-specific recalibration. This work offers a scalable and intuitive interface for both general-purpose robotic manipulation and assistive technologies. 🧠 核心术语库 [[表面肌电信号 (sEMG)]] [[灵巧手遥操作]] [[EMG2Pose 神经网络]] [[手部位姿重映射]] [[运动学预测]] 🔬 核心方法简述 采集同步的表面肌电（sEMG）与动捕手套手部姿态数据，训练 EMG2Pose 神经网络直接从肌肉活动预测手部运动学，并开发鲁棒的手部重映射算法将预测姿态映射至灵巧手进行实时控制 💬 锐评 摘要中宣称无需密集个体校准即具备跨物体/环境泛化能力存在技术挑战未解，sEMG 信号易受干扰且存在通道漂移问题，文中未详述如何保证非实验室环境下信号稳定性的具体机制 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 创新性融合分层架构与VLM语义路由解决复合技能冲突，生物力学一致性提升动作自然性。但VLM依赖可能限制实时性，复杂场景下路由决策泛化能力待验证，需关注跨机器人平台迁移成本。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Yutong Shen, Hangxu Liu, Penghui Liu, Jiashuo Luo, Yongkang Zhang, Rex Morvley, Chen Jiang, Jianwei Zhang, Lei Zhang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-09 16:28:26 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08572v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过分层专家策略与视觉语言模型协同，首次实现人形机器人自然稳定且可组合的全身 locomotion-manipulation 控制范式 📄 摘要： Learning natural, stable, and compositionally generalizable whole-body control policies for humanoid robots performing simultaneous locomotion and manipulation (loco-manipulation) remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. Existing reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single monolithic policy to acquire multiple skills, which often leads to cross-skill gradient interference and motion pattern conflicts in high-degree-of-freedom systems. As a result, generated behaviors frequently exhibit unnatural movements, limited stability, and poor generalization to complex task compositions. To address these limitations, we propose MetaWorld-X, a hierarchical world model framework for humanoid control. Guided by a divide-and-conquer principle, our method decomposes complex control problems into a set of specialized expert policies (Specialized Expert Policies, SEP). Each expert is trained under human motion priors through imitation-constrained reinforcement learning, introducing biomechanically consistent inductive biases that ensure natural and physically plausible motion generation. Building upon this foundation, we further develop an Intelligent Routing Mechanism (IRM) supervised by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), enabling semantic-driven expert composition. The VLM-guided router dynamically integrates expert policies according to high-level task semantics, facilitating compositional generalization and adaptive execution in multi-stage loco-manipulation tasks. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Hierarchical World Modeling]] [[Specialized Expert Policies (SEP)]] [[VLM-guided Intelligent Routing Mechanism (IRM)]] [[Imitation-constrained RL]] [[Compositional Generalization]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出分层世界模型MetaWorld-X，将复杂控制问题分解为多领域专用专家策略（SEP），通过人类运动先验的模仿约束强化学习训练；结合VLM监督的智能路由机制（IRM）实现语义驱动专家动态组合。 💬 锐评 创新性融合分层架构与VLM语义路由解决复合技能冲突，生物力学一致性提升动作自然性。但VLM依赖可能限制实时性，复杂场景下路由决策泛化能力待验证，需关注跨机器人平台迁移成本。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: FAME: Force-Adaptive RL for Expanding the Manipulation Envelope of a Full-Scale Humanoid
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作在真机（Unitree H12）上验证了无感测器方案的有效性，相比基线将平衡成功率提升超一倍，具有显著的工程落地价值。然而摘要显示仿真测试仅涵盖 5 种固定臂配置，未充分展示动态连续运动中的泛化能力；此外，依赖动力学模型反推交互力的方法对模型参数精度敏感，在实际复杂环境中的残差容忍度存疑。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: FAME: Force-Adaptive RL for Expanding the Manipulation Envelope of a Full-Scale Humanoid 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Niraj Pudasaini, Yutong Zhang, Jensen Lavering, Alessandro Roncone, Nikolaus Correll 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-09 21:49:00 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08961v1 🧾 一句话总结： FAME 通过动力学估计算法与力自适应 RL 相结合，实现了全尺寸人形机器人在无腕部传感器条件下应对双指交互力并维持平衡的能力。 📄 摘要： Maintaining balance under external hand forces is critical for humanoid bimanual manipulation, where interaction forces propagate through the kinematic chain and constrain the feasible manipulation envelope. We propose \textbf{FAME}, a force-adaptive reinforcement learning framework that conditions a standing policy on a learned latent context encoding upper-body joint configuration and bimanual interaction forces. During training, we apply diverse, spherically sampled 3D forces on each hand to inject disturbances in simulation together with an upper-body pose curriculum, exposing the policy to manipulation-induced perturbations across continuously varying arm configurations. At deployment, interaction forces are estimated from the robot dynamics and fed to the same encoder, enabling online adaptation without wrist force/torque sensors. In simulation across five fixed arm configurations with randomized hand forces and commanded base heights, FAME improves mean standing success to 73.84%, compared to 51.40% for the curriculum-only baseline and 29.44% for the base policy. We further deploy the learned policy on a full-scale Unitree H12 humanoid and evaluate robustness in representative load-interaction scenarios, including asymmetric single-arm load and symmetric bimanual load. Code and videos are available on https://fame10.github.io/Fame/ 🧠 核心术语库 [[Force-Adaptive RL]] [[Dynamics-based Force Estimation]] [[Bimanual Manipulation Envelope]] [[Unitree H12 Deployment]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 FAME 力自适应强化学习框架，通过隐变量编码躯干构型与交互力条件化站立策略。训练中采用球面采样 3D 力扰动结合上肢姿态课程以增强对操作扰动的鲁棒性；部署时利用机器人动力学模型在线估计交互力，实现无需腕部传感器的适应控制。 💬 锐评 该工作在真机（Unitree H12）上验证了无感测器方案的有效性，相比基线将平衡成功率提升超一倍，具有显著的工程落地价值。然而摘要显示仿真测试仅涵盖 5 种固定臂配置，未充分展示动态连续运动中的泛化能力；此外，依赖动力学模型反推交互力的方法对模型参数精度敏感，在实际复杂环境中的残差容忍度存疑。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: DexHiL: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Vision-Language-Action Model Post-Training in Dexterous Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作首创集成式臂手 HiL 架构，直击高维接触场景下 VLA 分布差异难题，实证提升显著（25%）。但摘要未披露冷启动阶段的人工干预频率与实时计算延迟细节，实际落地中规模化的人效成本与扩展性仍是潜在瓶颈。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: DexHiL: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Vision-Language-Action Model Post-Training in Dexterous Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Yifan Han, Zhongxi Chen, Yuxuan Zhao, Congsheng Xu, Yanming Shao, Yichuan Peng, Yao Mu, Wenzhao Lian 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-10 02:55:27 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09121v1 🧾 一句话总结： 提出首个集成机械臂与灵巧手的人机回环后训练框架，通过实时干预与智能采样策略，显著提升 VLA 模型在复杂灵巧操作任务上的可靠性与成功率。 📄 摘要： While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated promising generalization capabilities in robotic manipulation, deploying them on specific and complex downstream tasks still demands effective post-training. In parallel, Human-in-the-Loop (HiL) learning has proven to be a powerful mechanism for refining robot policies. However, extending this paradigm to dexterous manipulation remains challenging: multi-finger control is high-dimensional, contact-intensive, and exhibits execution distributions that differ markedly from standard arm motions, leaving existing dexterous VLA systems limited in reliability and adaptability. We present DexHiL, the first integrated arm-hand human-in-the-loop framework for dexterous VLA models, enabling coordinated interventions over the arm and the dexterous hand within a single system. DexHiL introduces an intervention-aware data sampling strategy that prioritizes corrective segments for post-training, alongside a lightweight teleoperation interface that supports instantaneous human corrections during execution. Real-robot experiments demonstrate that DexHiL serves as an effective post-training framework, yielding a substantial performance leap, outperforming standard offline-only fine-tuning baselines by an average of 25% in success rates across distinct tasks. Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Cross-Hand Latent Representation for Vision-Language-Action Models
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 动机中提及人类感知的声音维度，但方法核心仍局限于视觉 - 语言条件控制，多模态融合潜力未明；‘优于原始关节空间’的论断缺乏基准细节支持；未披露隐式空间的具体学习范式与跨物理实体泛化的失效边界。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Cross-Hand Latent Representation for Vision-Language-Action Models 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Guangqi Jiang, Yutong Liang, Jianglong Ye, Jia-Yang Huang, Changwei Jing, Rocky Duan, Pieter Abbeel, Xiaolong Wang, Xueyan Zou 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-10 18:50:57 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10158v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过构建跨灵巧手的统一隐式动作空间，有效解决了 VLA 模型在灵巧操作领域数据收集成本高及跨设备迁移难的瓶颈问题。 📄 摘要： Dexterous manipulation is essential for real-world robot autonomy, mirroring the central role of human hand coordination in daily activity. Humans rely on rich multimodal perception--vision, sound, and language-guided intent--to perform dexterous actions, motivating vision-based, language-conditioned manipulation systems for robots. However, training reliable vision-language-action (VLA) models for dexterous manipulation requires large-scale demonstrations across many robotic hands. In addition, as new dexterous embodiments appear rapidly, collecting data for each becomes costly and impractical, creating a need for scalable cross-embodiment learning. We introduce XL-VLA, a vision-language-action framework integrated with a unified latent action space shared across diverse dexterous hands. This embodiment-invariant latent space is directly pluggable into standard VLA architectures, enabling seamless cross-embodiment training and efficient reuse of both existing and newly collected data. Experimental results demonstrate that XL-VLA consistently outperforms baseline VLA models operating in raw joint spaces, establishing it as an effective solution for scalable cross-embodiment dexterous manipulation. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Vision-Language-Action (VLA)]] [[Dexterous Manipulation]] [[Cross-Embodiment Learning]] [[Latent Action Space]] [[Embodiment-Invariant]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 XL-VLA 框架，构建跨多种灵巧手的统一隐式动作空间（embodiment-invariant latent space），将其作为标准 VLA 架构的可插拔模块，实现跨实体训练与数据高效复用。 💬 锐评 动机中提及人类感知的声音维度，但方法核心仍局限于视觉 - 语言条件控制，多模态融合潜力未明；‘优于原始关节空间’的论断缺乏基准细节支持；未披露隐式空间的具体学习范式与跨物理实体泛化的失效边界。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Cybo-Waiter: A Physical Agentic Framework for Humanoid Whole-Body Locomotion-Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作创新点在于建立了高层语义到低层动作的可验证程序化闭环，显式引入 3D 几何信息而非黑盒感知来判断任务成功，显著提升了长视界任务鲁棒性。但摘要未披露实时计算开销及在部分可观测下的极端边界情况处理策略，且过度依赖 VLM 生成初始计划可能继承语义偏差风险。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Cybo-Waiter: A Physical Agentic Framework for Humanoid Whole-Body Locomotion-Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Peng Ren, Haoyang Ge, Chuan Qi, Cong Huang, Hong Li, Jiang Zhao, Pei Chi, Kai Chen 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-11 11:41:32 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10675v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过引入基于谓词的验证机制与 3D 几何监督闭环，有效解决了人形机器人在复杂环境中长视界移动操作任务的可靠性与一致性挑战。 📄 摘要： Robots are increasingly expected to execute open ended natural language requests in human environments, which demands reliable long horizon execution under partial observability. This is especially challenging for humanoids because locomotion and manipulation are tightly coupled through stance, reachability, and balance. We present a humanoid agent framework that turns VLM plans into verifiable task programs and closes the loop with multi object 3D geometric supervision. A VLM planner compiles each instruction into a typed JSON sequence of subtasks with explicit predicate based preconditions and success conditions. Using SAM3 and RGB-D, we ground all task relevant entities in 3D, estimate object centroids and extents, and evaluate predicates over stable frames to obtain condition level diagnostics. The supervisor uses these diagnostics to verify subtask completion and to provide condition-level feedback for progression and replanning. We execute each subtask by coordinating humanoid locomotion and whole-body manipulation, selecting feasible motion primitives under reachability and balance constraints. Experiments on tabletop manipulation and long horizon humanoid loco manipulation tasks show improved robustness from multi object grounding, temporal stability, and recovery driven replanning. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Physical Agentic Framework]] [[VLM Task Program Compilation]] [[Multi-object 3D Geometric Supervision]] [[Predicate-based Verification]] [[Locomotion-Manipulation Coupling]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出物理智能体框架，利用 VLM 将自然语言指令编译为含谓词约束的 JSON 子任务序列；结合 SAM3 与 RGB-D 进行多对象 3D 几何监督以评估状态；Supervisor 基于几何诊断闭环验证任务完成并提供重规划反馈；底层执行时在可达性与平衡约束下协调全身运动原语。 💬 锐评 该工作创新点在于建立了高层语义到低层动作的可验证程序化闭环，显式引入 3D 几何信息而非黑盒感知来判断任务成功，显著提升了长视界任务鲁棒性。但摘要未披露实时计算开销及在部分可观测下的极端边界情况处理策略，且过度依赖 VLM 生成初始计划可能继承语义偏差风险。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Contact Coverage-Guided Exploration for General-Purpose Dexterous Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该研究切中了灵巧操作领域长期依赖任务特定先验和手工奖励设计的痛点，提出了一种面向通用操作的探索策略。相比传统方法，CCGE 通过解耦探索信号与具体任务目标，实现了从单指/双指交互到复杂重定向任务的泛化能力。虽然摘要未详述哈希编码的精度细节，但其在多项不同性质任务及实机上的鲁棒表现，证明了该方法在解决冷启动阶段数据效率低下问题上的显著价值。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Contact Coverage-Guided Exploration for General-Purpose Dexterous Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Zixuan Liu, Ruoyi Qiao, Chenrui Tie, Xuanwei Liu, Yunfan Lou, Chongkai Gao, Zhixuan Xu, Lin Shao 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-11 16:55:49 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10971v1 🧾 一句话总结： 本文提出一种无需任务先验的通用接触覆盖引导探索方法 CCGE，通过学习接触规律显著提升灵巧机器人训练效率与现实场景迁移性能。 📄 摘要： Deep Reinforcement learning (DRL) has achieved remarkable success in domains with well-defined reward structures, such as Atari games and locomotion. In contrast, dexterous manipulation lacks general-purpose reward formulations and typically depends on task-specific, handcrafted priors to guide hand-object interactions. We propose Contact Coverage-Guided Exploration (CCGE), a general exploration method designed for general-purpose dexterous manipulation tasks. CCGE represents contact state as the intersection between object surface points and predefined hand keypoints, encouraging dexterous hands to discover diverse and novel contact patterns, namely which fingers contact which object regions. It maintains a contact counter conditioned on discretized object states obtained via learned hash codes, capturing how frequently each finger interacts with different object regions. This counter is leveraged in two complementary ways: (1) to assign a count-based contact coverage reward that promotes exploration of novel contact patterns, and (2) an energy-based reaching reward that guides the agent toward under-explored contact regions. We evaluate CCGE on a diverse set of dexterous manipulation tasks, including cluttered object singulation, constrained object retrieval, in-hand reorientation, and bimanual manipulation. Experimental results show that CCGE substantially improves training efficiency and success rates over existing exploration methods, and that the contact patterns learned with CCGE transfer robustly to real-world robotic systems. Project page is https://contact-coverage-guided-exploration.github.io. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Contact Coverage-Guided Exploration (CCGE)]] [[深度强化学习]] [[通用奖励构建]] [[物体表面接触表征]] [[学习哈希码离散化]] [[仿真到现实迁移]] 🔬 核心方法简述 CCGE 方法将接触状态定义为物体表面点与预定义手关键点的交集，旨在发现多样化的新颖接触模式。其核心机制是利用学习得到的哈希码对物体状态进行离散化，并维护一个条件化的接触计数器。该计数器被用于生成两类互补奖励：一是基于计数的接触覆盖奖励，以鼓励探索新颖接触；二是能量型接近奖励，引导智能体走向未探索的接触区域。 💬 锐评 该研究切中了灵巧操作领域长期依赖任务特定先验和手工奖励设计的痛点，提出了一种面向通用操作的探索策略。相比传统方法，CCGE 通过解耦探索信号与具体任务目标，实现了从单指/双指交互到复杂重定向任务的泛化能力。虽然摘要未详述哈希编码的精度细节，但其在多项不同性质任务及实机上的鲁棒表现，证明了该方法在解决冷启动阶段数据效率低下问题上的显著价值。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: Concurrent Prehensile and Nonprehensile Manipulation: A Practical Approach to Multi-Stage Dexterous Tasks
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 虽在样本效率上显著优于扩散策略且具备真实机器人验证，但66%的成功率在复杂任务中仍有提升空间；泛化能力依赖于预训练物体的相似性及有限的空间偏移范围（+/-25cm），且仍依赖少量人工演示数据，并非完全无监督学习。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: Concurrent Prehensile and Nonprehensile Manipulation: A Practical Approach to Multi-Stage Dexterous Tasks 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Hao Jiang, Yue Wu, Yue Wang, Gaurav S. Sukhatme, Daniel Seita 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-12 08:25:21 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.11655v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该研究通过技能分解与检索对齐机制，实现了极低样本成本下的多阶段灵巧手并发操作，在真实场景测试中展现了超越扩散策略的泛化性与成功率。 📄 摘要： Dexterous hands enable concurrent prehensile and nonprehensile manipulation, such as holding one object while interacting with another, a capability essential for everyday tasks yet underexplored in robotics. Learning such long-horizon, contact-rich multi-stage behaviors is challenging because demonstrations are expensive to collect and end-to-end policies require substantial data to generalize across varied object geometries and placements. We present DexMulti, a sample-efficient approach for real-world dexterous multi-task manipulation that decomposes demonstrations into object-centric skills with well-defined temporal boundaries. Rather than learning monolithic policies, our method retrieves demonstrated skills based on current object geometry, aligns them to the observed object state using an uncertainty-aware estimator that tracks centroid and yaw, and executes them via a retrieve-align-execute paradigm. We evaluate on three multi-stage tasks requiring concurrent manipulation (Grasp + Pull, Grasp + Open, and Grasp + Grasp) across two dexterous hands (Allegro and LEAP) in over 1,000 real-world trials. Our approach achieves an average success rate of 66% on training objects with only 3-4 demonstrations per object, outperforming diffusion policy baselines by 2-3x while requiring far fewer demonstrations. Results demonstrate robust generalization to held-out objects and spatial variations up to +/-25 cm. 🧠 核心术语库 [[并发抓持与非抓持操作]] [[物体中心技能分解]] [[检索 - 对齐 - 执行范式]] [[不确定性感知估计器]] [[扩散策略基线]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出DexMulti框架，将长周期演示分解为具有明确时间边界的物体中心技能；采用“检索 - 对齐 - 执行”范式，基于物体几何形状检索技能，利用不确定性感知估计器（追踪质心和偏航角）将技能对齐到观测状态并执行。 💬 锐评 虽在样本效率上显著优于扩散策略且具备真实机器人验证，但66%的成功率在复杂任务中仍有提升空间；泛化能力依赖于预训练物体的相似性及有限的空间偏移范围（+/-25cm），且仍依赖少量人工演示数据，并非完全无监督学习。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: HumDex:Humanoid Dexterous Manipulation Made Easy
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该研究直接针对灵巧操作数据收集瓶颈提出软硬件结合的系统方案，利用IMU平衡了便携与精度，并通过迁移学习缓解具身差异，但作为摘要陈述，未详述极端干扰下的系统稳定性及具体性能量化指标
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: HumDex:Humanoid Dexterous Manipulation Made Easy 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Liang Heng, Yihe Tang, Jiajun Xu, Henghui Bao, Di Huang, Yue Wang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-12 17:59:39 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12260v1 🧾 一句话总结： 提出了一种集成便携式IMU遥操作与两阶段模仿学习的框架，显著降低了人形机器人全躯干灵巧操作的高质量数据获取成本并增强了任务泛化能力 📄 摘要： This paper investigates humanoid whole-body dexterous manipulation, where the efficient collection of high-quality demonstration data remains a central bottleneck.   Existing teleoperation systems often suffer from limited portability, occlusion, or insufficient precision, which hinders their applicability to complex whole-body tasks. To address these challenges, we introduce HumDex, a portable teleoperation system designed for humanoid whole-body dexterous manipulation. Our system leverages IMU-based motion tracking to address the portability-precision trade-off, enabling accurate full-body tracking while remaining easy to deploy. For dexterous hand control, we further introduce a learning-based retargeting method that generates smooth and natural hand motions without manual parameter tuning. Beyond teleoperation, HumDex enables efficient collection of human motion data. Building on this capability, we propose a two-stage imitation learning framework that first pre-trains on diverse human motion data to learn generalizable priors, and then fine-tunes on robot data to bridge the embodiment gap for precise execution. We demonstrate that this approach significantly improves generalization to new configurations, objects, and backgrounds with minimal data acquisition costs. The entire system is fully reproducible and open-sourced at https://github.com/physical-superintelligence-lab/HumDex. 🧠 核心术语库 [[人形整机灵巧操作]] [[基于IMU的运动追踪]] [[基于学习的重定向方法]] [[两阶段模仿学习框架]] [[具身鸿沟]] 🔬 核心方法简述 构建基于IMU的便携式遥操作系统实现全身精准追踪且易于部署；引入无需手动调参的基于学习的手部重定向算法生成平滑动作；设计两阶段模仿学习框架，先对人类通用数据预训练以习得先验，再在机器人数据上微调以桥接具身鸿沟 💬 锐评 该研究直接针对灵巧操作数据收集瓶颈提出软硬件结合的系统方案，利用IMU平衡了便携与精度，并通过迁移学习缓解具身差异，但作为摘要陈述，未详述极端干扰下的系统稳定性及具体性能量化指标 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

Humanoid_Manipulation.title: $Ψ_0$: An Open Foundation Model Towards Universal Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
Humanoid_Manipulation.short_review: 该工作有力反驳了当前主流的‘人机混训’策略，揭示了本体运动学差异导致的数据低效问题。其依赖‘高质量特定数据食谱’虽获成效，但暗示了数据清洗的高门槛。开源生态降低了使用门槛，但在开放测试中的长序列任务稳定性仍是未知数。
Humanoid_Manipulation.full_note: $Ψ_0$: An Open Foundation Model Towards Universal Humanoid Loco-Manipulation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： Humanoid_Manipulation 👤 作者： Songlin Wei, Hongyi Jing, Boqian Li, Zhenyu Zhao, Jiageng Mao, Zhenhao Ni, Sicheng He, Jie Liu, Xiawei Liu, Kaidi Kang, Sheng Zang, Weiduo Yuan, Marco Pavone, Di Huang, Yue Wang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-12 17:59:51 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12263v1 🧾 一句话总结： Psi-Zero通过解耦视觉表征学习与动作生成控制，仅需千小时级人眼视频与数十小时机器人数据，即以远超同体量基线的性能达成通用双足机器人的Loco-Manipulation目标。 📄 摘要： We introduce $Ψ_0$ (Psi-Zero), an open foundation model to address challenging humanoid loco-manipulation tasks. While existing approaches often attempt to address this fundamental problem by co-training on large and diverse human and humanoid data, we argue that this strategy is suboptimal due to the fundamental kinematic and motion disparities between humans and humanoid robots. Therefore, data efficiency and model performance remain unsatisfactory despite the considerable data volume. To address this challenge, \ours\;decouples the learning process to maximize the utility of heterogeneous data sources. Specifically, we propose a staged training paradigm with different learning objectives: First, we autoregressively pre-train a VLM backbone on large-scale egocentric human videos to acquire generalizable visual-action representations. Then, we post-train a flow-based action expert on high-quality humanoid robot data to learn precise robot joint control. Our research further identifies a critical yet often overlooked data recipe: in contrast to approaches that scale with noisy Internet clips or heterogeneous cross-embodiment robot datasets, we demonstrate that pre-training on high-quality egocentric human manipulation data followed by post-training on domain-specific real-world humanoid trajectories yields superior performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that \ours\ achieves the best performance using only about 800 hours of human video data and 30 hours of real-world robot data, outperforming baselines pre-trained on more than 10$\times$ as much data by over 40\% in overall success rate across multiple tasks. We will open-source the entire ecosystem to the community, including a data processing and training pipeline, a humanoid foundation model, and a real-time action inference engine. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Psi-Zero]] [[Humanoid Loco-Manipulation]] [[Staged Training Paradigm]] [[Flow-based Action Expert]] [[Egocentric Human Videos]] 🔬 核心方法简述 采用分阶段解耦训练范式：1. 预训练：在大规模第一视角人类视频上自回归训练VLM骨干，获取泛化视觉-动作表征；2. 后训练：在高保真本体机器人轨迹数据上微调流式动作专家，实现精确关节控制。 💬 锐评 该工作有力反驳了当前主流的‘人机混训’策略，揭示了本体运动学差异导致的数据低效问题。其依赖‘高质量特定数据食谱’虽获成效，但暗示了数据清洗的高门槛。开源生态降低了使用门槛，但在开放测试中的长序列任务稳定性仍是未知数。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Symmetries-enhanced Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 创新性地将对称增强方法从依赖内在对称性扩展至可构建外在对称性的场景，但摘要未详述外在对称性的具体定义方式及计算开销，且实验主要验证于四旋翼群聚，跨任务泛化效果待考。
MARL.full_note: Symmetries-enhanced Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Nikolaos Bousias, Stefanos Pertigkiozoglou, Kostas Daniilidis, George Pappas 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-01-02 08:41:31 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.01136v2 🧾 一句话总结： 通过引入外在对称性嵌入与专用等变图架构，有效解决了多智能体系统在对称性缺失条件下的泛化难与扩展性差问题。 📄 摘要： Multi-agent reinforcement learning has emerged as a powerful framework for enabling agents to learn complex, coordinated behaviors but faces persistent challenges regarding its generalization, scalability and sample efficiency. Recent advancements have sought to alleviate those issues by embedding intrinsic symmetries of the systems in the policy. Yet, most dynamical systems exhibit little to no symmetries to exploit. This paper presents a novel framework for embedding extrinsic symmetries in multi-agent system dynamics that enables the use of symmetry-enhanced methods to address systems with insufficient intrinsic symmetries, expanding the scope of equivariant learning to a wide variety of MARL problems. Central to our framework is the Group Equivariant Graphormer, a group-modular architecture specifically designed for distributed swarming tasks. Extensive experiments on a swarm of symmetry-breaking quadrotors validate the effectiveness of our approach, showcasing its potential for improved generalization and zero-shot scalability. Our method achieves significant reductions in collision rates and enhances task success rates across a diverse range of scenarios and varying swarm sizes. 🧠 核心术语库 [[外在对称性]] [[Group Equivariant Graphormer]] [[零样本扩展性]] [[对称性破缺]] [[多智能体强化学习]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出将外在对称性嵌入多智能体系统动力学的框架，采用专为分布式群聚任务设计的 Group Equivariant Graphormer 架构，以克服动力学系统中内在对称性不足的局限。 💬 锐评 创新性地将对称增强方法从依赖内在对称性扩展至可构建外在对称性的场景，但摘要未详述外在对称性的具体定义方式及计算开销，且实验主要验证于四旋翼群聚，跨任务泛化效果待考。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Mean Field Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 该工作利用平均场理论成功缓解了大数量智能体下的维数灾难问题，具有开创性的范式意义；但基于摘要可知，该方法依赖于将个体交互近似为对平均效应的响应，隐含了对智能体异质性或局部博弈细节的舍弃，具体在何种规模下近似精度会显著下降需进一步实证验证。
MARL.full_note: Mean Field Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Yaodong Yang, Rui Luo, Minne Li, Ming Zhou, Weinan Zhang, Jun Wang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2018-02-15 09:07:57 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/1802.05438v5 🧾 一句话总结： 通过引入平均场近似机制解决大规模智能体系统的可扩展性难题，实现了在无模型设定下求解 Ising 模型等经典问题的纳什均衡收敛。 📄 摘要： Existing multi-agent reinforcement learning methods are limited typically to a small number of agents. When the agent number increases largely, the learning becomes intractable due to the curse of the dimensionality and the exponential growth of agent interactions. In this paper, we present \emph{Mean Field Reinforcement Learning} where the interactions within the population of agents are approximated by those between a single agent and the average effect from the overall population or neighboring agents; the interplay between the two entities is mutually reinforced: the learning of the individual agent's optimal policy depends on the dynamics of the population, while the dynamics of the population change according to the collective patterns of the individual policies. We develop practical mean field Q-learning and mean field Actor-Critic algorithms and analyze the convergence of the solution to Nash equilibrium. Experiments on Gaussian squeeze, Ising model, and battle games justify the learning effectiveness of our mean field approaches. In addition, we report the first result to solve the Ising model via model-free reinforcement learning methods. 🧠 核心术语库 [[平均场强化学习 (Mean Field RL)]] [[维度灾难 (Curse of Dimensionality)]] [[纳什均衡 (Nash Equilibrium)]] [[模型无强化学习 (Model-free RL)]] [[种群动态 (Population Dynamics)]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出平均场强化学习（MFRL）框架，将多智能体系统中的复杂交互简化为单个智能体与整体种群平均效应之间的交互；开发了相应的平均场Q学习与平均场演员 - 评论家算法，并证明了其收敛至纳什均衡。 💬 锐评 该工作利用平均场理论成功缓解了大数量智能体下的维数灾难问题，具有开创性的范式意义；但基于摘要可知，该方法依赖于将个体交互近似为对平均效应的响应，隐含了对智能体异质性或局部博弈细节的舍弃，具体在何种规模下近似精度会显著下降需进一步实证验证。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Offline Decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 摘要中提到的理论收敛性证明基于被修改的非平稳动态，其假设前提需严格验证；‘值偏差’依赖离线数据中对‘高价值状态’的识别，若存在评估噪声可能放大误差；此外，文中未说明该框架在稀疏奖励或极高维状态空间下的泛化瓶颈及计算开销。
MARL.full_note: Offline Decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Jiechuan Jiang, Zongqing Lu 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2021-08-04 03:53:33 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2108.01832v2 🧾 一句话总结： 针对离线多智能体协作中的动态分布偏移问题，通过修正转移概率机制使智能体在无需在线交互的情况下学习到协调且高性能的策略。 📄 摘要： In many real-world multi-agent cooperative tasks, due to high cost and risk, agents cannot continuously interact with the environment and collect experiences during learning, but have to learn from offline datasets. However, the transition dynamics in the dataset of each agent can be much different from the ones induced by the learned policies of other agents in execution, creating large errors in value estimates. Consequently, agents learn uncoordinated low-performing policies. In this paper, we propose a framework for offline decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning, which exploits value deviation and transition normalization to deliberately modify the transition probabilities. Value deviation optimistically increases the transition probabilities of high-value next states, and transition normalization normalizes the transition probabilities of next states. They together enable agents to learn high-performing and coordinated policies. Theoretically, we prove the convergence of Q-learning under the altered non-stationary transition dynamics. Empirically, we show that the framework can be easily built on many existing offline reinforcement learning algorithms and achieve substantial improvement in a variety of multi-agent tasks. 🧠 核心术语库 [[离线去中心化多智能体强化学习]] [[值偏差 (Value Deviation)]] [[转移归一化 (Transition Normalization)]] [[非平稳转移动态]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出一种离线去中心化多智能体强化学习框架，利用值偏差（Value Deviation）乐观增加高价值下一状态的转移概率，并结合转移归一化（Transition Normalization）调整概率分布，以此修正因数据集与执行策略动态不一致导致的估计误差，从而习得协调的高性能策略。 💬 锐评 摘要中提到的理论收敛性证明基于被修改的非平稳动态，其假设前提需严格验证；‘值偏差’依赖离线数据中对‘高价值状态’的识别，若存在评估噪声可能放大误差；此外，文中未说明该框架在稀疏奖励或极高维状态空间下的泛化瓶颈及计算开销。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: BenchMARL: Benchmarking Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 摘要强调解决了复现性危机，但将标准化工具强依赖于单一开源项目（Facebook/TorchRL）存在生态锁定风险；‘一行命令’宣称简化了流程，却未阐明如何处理 MARL 特有的复杂交互逻辑在自动化配置中的边界情况
MARL.full_note: BenchMARL: Benchmarking Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Matteo Bettini, Amanda Prorok, Vincent Moens 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2023-12-03 18:15:58 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.01472v3 🧾 一句话总结： 一款面向 PyTorch 社区的开源 MARL 基准测试工具，旨在通过统一框架解决多智能体强化学习研究的复现性与标准化难题 📄 摘要： The field of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is currently facing a reproducibility crisis. While solutions for standardized reporting have been proposed to address the issue, we still lack a benchmarking tool that enables standardization and reproducibility, while leveraging cutting-edge Reinforcement Learning (RL) implementations. In this paper, we introduce BenchMARL, the first MARL training library created to enable standardized benchmarking across different algorithms, models, and environments. BenchMARL uses TorchRL as its backend, granting it high performance and maintained state-of-the-art implementations while addressing the broad community of MARL PyTorch users. Its design enables systematic configuration and reporting, thus allowing users to create and run complex benchmarks from simple one-line inputs. BenchMARL is open-sourced on GitHub: https://github.com/facebookresearch/BenchMARL 🧠 核心术语库 [[多智能体强化学习]] [[复现性危机]] [[基准测试]] [[TorchRL]] [[标准化报告]] 🔬 核心方法简述 基于 TorchRL 构建开源训练库，利用其高性能与 SOTA 实现作为后端，通过系统化配置和自动报告机制，支持跨算法、模型和环境的标准化基准测试 💬 锐评 摘要强调解决了复现性危机，但将标准化工具强依赖于单一开源项目（Facebook/TorchRL）存在生态锁定风险；‘一行命令’宣称简化了流程，却未阐明如何处理 MARL 特有的复杂交互逻辑在自动化配置中的边界情况 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Off-Beat Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 创新性地针对非同步动作执行场景建模，但摘要未说明计算复杂度和通信开销；在StarCraft II等复杂任务中的泛化性需进一步验证。
MARL.full_note: Off-Beat Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Wei Qiu, Weixun Wang, Rundong Wang, Bo An, Yujing Hu, Svetlana Obraztsova, Zinovi Rabinovich, Jianye Hao, Yingfeng Chen, Changjie Fan 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2022-05-27 02:21:04 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.13718v2 🧾 一句话总结： 解决了多智能体强化学习中因动作执行时长预设导致的时序异步协调难题，显著提升样本效率与协作性能 📄 摘要： We investigate model-free multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in environments where off-beat actions are prevalent, i.e., all actions have pre-set execution durations. During execution durations, the environment changes are influenced by, but not synchronised with, action execution. Such a setting is ubiquitous in many real-world problems. However, most MARL methods assume actions are executed immediately after inference, which is often unrealistic and can lead to catastrophic failure for multi-agent coordination with off-beat actions. In order to fill this gap, we develop an algorithmic framework for MARL with off-beat actions. We then propose a novel episodic memory, LeGEM, for model-free MARL algorithms. LeGEM builds agents' episodic memories by utilizing agents' individual experiences. It boosts multi-agent learning by addressing the challenging temporal credit assignment problem raised by the off-beat actions via our novel reward redistribution scheme, alleviating the issue of non-Markovian reward. We evaluate LeGEM on various multi-agent scenarios with off-beat actions, including Stag-Hunter Game, Quarry Game, Afforestation Game, and StarCraft II micromanagement tasks. Empirical results show that LeGEM significantly boosts multi-agent coordination and achieves leading performance and improved sample efficiency. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Off-Beat Actions]] [[Episodic Memory]] [[Temporal Credit Assignment]] [[Non-Markovian Reward]] [[Reward Redistribution Scheme]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出基于LeGEM的 episodic memory 框架，通过个体经验构建记忆并设计奖励再分配机制解决 off-beat actions 引发的时序信用分配与非马尔可夫奖励问题。 💬 锐评 创新性地针对非同步动作执行场景建模，但摘要未说明计算复杂度和通信开销；在StarCraft II等复杂任务中的泛化性需进一步验证。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Kindness in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 摘要未阐明反事实状态推断的计算开销及实时性瓶颈；‘感知仁慈后减少自身奖励’的策略描述存在逻辑模糊性，可能引发局部最优陷阱或与全局回报最大化冲突；实验场景集中在特定博弈环境，泛化能力验证不足。
MARL.full_note: Kindness in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Farinaz Alamiyan-Harandi, Mersad Hassanjani, Pouria Ramazi 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2023-11-06 19:53:26 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.04239v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该论文创新性地引入基于反事实意图的‘仁慈’概念至 MARL，旨在通过模拟人类互惠心理提升协作任务的智能体表现。 📄 摘要： In human societies, people often incorporate fairness in their decisions and treat reciprocally by being kind to those who act kindly. They evaluate the kindness of others' actions not only by monitoring the outcomes but also by considering the intentions. This behavioral concept can be adapted to train cooperative agents in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). We propose the KindMARL method, where agents' intentions are measured by counterfactual reasoning over the environmental impact of the actions that were available to the agents. More specifically, the current environment state is compared with the estimation of the current environment state provided that the agent had chosen another action. The difference between each agent's reward, as the outcome of its action, with that of its fellow, multiplied by the intention of the fellow is then taken as the fellow's "kindness". If the result of each reward-comparison confirms the agent's superiority, it perceives the fellow's kindness and reduces its own reward. Experimental results in the Cleanup and Harvest environments show that training based on the KindMARL method enabled the agents to earn 89\% (resp. 37\%) and 44% (resp. 43\%) more total rewards than training based on the Inequity Aversion and Social Influence methods. The effectiveness of KindMARL is further supported by experiments in a traffic light control problem. 🧠 核心术语库 [[反事实推理]] [[意图衡量]] [[仁慈度量]] [[多智能体强化学习]] 🔬 核心方法简述 利用反事实推理评估智能体意图，通过对比实际环境与假设采取不同动作的状态估计差异来量化‘意图’，结合奖励差与意图值计算‘仁慈度’，进而调整收益函数以诱导合作。 💬 锐评 摘要未阐明反事实状态推断的计算开销及实时性瓶颈；‘感知仁慈后减少自身奖励’的策略描述存在逻辑模糊性，可能引发局部最优陷阱或与全局回报最大化冲突；实验场景集中在特定博弈环境，泛化能力验证不足。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Decentralized Deterministic Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 理论贡献显著但实用受限：价值函数依赖线性逼近限制了应对复杂非线性环境的能力；虽填补了确定性策略的理论空白，但未详述高维动作空间下的实际计算复杂度与通信开销
MARL.full_note: Decentralized Deterministic Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Antoine Grosnit, Desmond Cai, Laura Wynter 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2021-02-19 05:10:15 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2102.09745v1 🧾 一句话总结： 首次为高维连续动作空间的分散式多智能体系统提供具备收敛证明的确定性策略学习框架，推动理论走向真实部署 📄 摘要： [Zhang, ICML 2018] provided the first decentralized actor-critic algorithm for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) that offers convergence guarantees. In that work, policies are stochastic and are defined on finite action spaces. We extend those results to offer a provably-convergent decentralized actor-critic algorithm for learning deterministic policies on continuous action spaces. Deterministic policies are important in real-world settings. To handle the lack of exploration inherent in deterministic policies, we consider both off-policy and on-policy settings. We provide the expression of a local deterministic policy gradient, decentralized deterministic actor-critic algorithms and convergence guarantees for linearly-approximated value functions. This work will help enable decentralized MARL in high-dimensional action spaces and pave the way for more widespread use of MARL. 🧠 核心术语库 [[分散式Actor-Critic]] [[确定性策略]] [[连续动作空间]] [[局部确定性策略梯度]] [[线性价值函数逼近]] [[收敛保证]] 🔬 核心方法简述 在Zhang ICML 2018随机策略算法基础上，扩展至确定性策略与连续动作空间；构建局部确定性策略梯度表达式，通过离策/在线策略设置解决探索缺失问题，并证明线性近似价值函数的收敛性 💬 锐评 理论贡献显著但实用受限：价值函数依赖线性逼近限制了应对复杂非线性环境的能力；虽填补了确定性策略的理论空白，但未详述高维动作空间下的实际计算复杂度与通信开销 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Mediated Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 创新引入协调者概念重构MARL合作范式，但依赖抽象机制设计与现实系统的适配性存疑；实验验证局限于矩阵/迭代游戏，复杂动态环境下的可扩展性未充分验证。
MARL.full_note: Mediated Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Dmitry Ivanov, Ilya Zisman, Kirill Chernyshev 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2023-06-14 10:31:37 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.08419v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过建立利益约束下的协调机制，为打破MARL中集体行动困境提供兼顾个体理性与社会效益的新路径 📄 摘要： The majority of Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) literature equates the cooperation of self-interested agents in mixed environments to the problem of social welfare maximization, allowing agents to arbitrarily share rewards and private information. This results in agents that forgo their individual goals in favour of social good, which can potentially be exploited by selfish defectors. We argue that cooperation also requires agents' identities and boundaries to be respected by making sure that the emergent behaviour is an equilibrium, i.e., a convention that no agent can deviate from and receive higher individual payoffs. Inspired by advances in mechanism design, we propose to solve the problem of cooperation, defined as finding socially beneficial equilibrium, by using mediators. A mediator is a benevolent entity that may act on behalf of agents, but only for the agents that agree to it. We show how a mediator can be trained alongside agents with policy gradient to maximize social welfare subject to constraints that encourage agents to cooperate through the mediator. Our experiments in matrix and iterative games highlight the potential power of applying mediators in MARL. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Mediator(协调者)]] [[Social Welfare Maximization(社会福利最大化)]] [[Nash Equilibrium(纳什均衡)]] [[Policy Gradient(策略梯度)]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出以机制设计思想构建协调者（mediator）框架，通过策略梯度训练协调者与智能体协同优化社会福利，在约束条件下平衡个体目标与社会合作需求。 💬 锐评 创新引入协调者概念重构MARL合作范式，但依赖抽象机制设计与现实系统的适配性存疑；实验验证局限于矩阵/迭代游戏，复杂动态环境下的可扩展性未充分验证。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Heterogeneity in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 本文切中了MARL领域对异质性缺乏统一认知的痛点，构建了从定义、量化到利用的方法论闭环，具有较高的理论前瞻性。但鉴于未见全文实证细节，难以确认五类划分是否覆盖典型场景，且动态参数共享的具体机制及其在极端异构条件下的性能边界尚需更多数据支撑。
MARL.full_note: Heterogeneity in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Tianyi Hu, Zhiqiang Pu, Yuan Wang, Tenghai Qiu, Min Chen, Xin Yu 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2025-12-28 14:07:31 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.22941v1 🧾 一句话总结： 本文通过建立异质性的严格数学定义与量化体系，并结合动态参数共享算法，为解决多智能体强化学习中的功能差异与策略多样性问题提供了基础框架。 📄 摘要： Heterogeneity is a fundamental property in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), which is closely related not only to the functional differences of agents, but also to policy diversity and environmental interactions. However, the MARL field currently lacks a rigorous definition and deeper understanding of heterogeneity. This paper systematically discusses heterogeneity in MARL from the perspectives of definition, quantification, and utilization. First, based on an agent-level modeling of MARL, we categorize heterogeneity into five types and provide mathematical definitions. Second, we define the concept of heterogeneity distance and propose a practical quantification method. Third, we design a heterogeneity-based multi-agent dynamic parameter sharing algorithm as an example of the application of our methodology. Case studies demonstrate that our method can effectively identify and quantify various types of agent heterogeneity. Experimental results show that the proposed algorithm, compared to other parameter sharing baselines, has better interpretability and stronger adaptability. The proposed methodology will help the MARL community gain a more comprehensive and profound understanding of heterogeneity, and further promote the development of practical algorithms. 🧠 核心术语库 [[多智能体异质性]] [[智能体级建模]] [[异质性距离]] [[动态参数共享]] [[策略多样性]] 🔬 核心方法简述 1. 基于智能体级建模将异质性划分为五类并提供数学定义；2. 定义异质性距离并提出量化方法；3. 构建基于异质性的动态参数共享算法以应用上述理论。 💬 锐评 本文切中了MARL领域对异质性缺乏统一认知的痛点，构建了从定义、量化到利用的方法论闭环，具有较高的理论前瞻性。但鉴于未见全文实证细节，难以确认五类划分是否覆盖典型场景，且动态参数共享的具体机制及其在极端异构条件下的性能边界尚需更多数据支撑。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Intent-aware Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 该方法通过简化为线性效用和意图信念有效规避了POMDP的维度灾难并保证收敛，但在复杂博弈中的线性假设可能存在表达瓶颈；性能高度依赖外部意图预测模块的精度，且非周期环境下的跨场景泛化能力仍需验证。
MARL.full_note: Intent-aware Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Siyuan Qi, Song-Chun Zhu 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2018-03-06 04:53:50 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.02018v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该文提出一种不依赖传统POMDP、结合意图信念与目标空间规划的轻量级MARL方法，成功在动态人机协作场景中实现了高效收敛与人机拟态行为。 📄 摘要： This paper proposes an intent-aware multi-agent planning framework as well as a learning algorithm. Under this framework, an agent plans in the goal space to maximize the expected utility. The planning process takes the belief of other agents' intents into consideration. Instead of formulating the learning problem as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), we propose a simple but effective linear function approximation of the utility function. It is based on the observation that for humans, other people's intents will pose an influence on our utility for a goal. The proposed framework has several major advantages: i) it is computationally feasible and guaranteed to converge. ii) It can easily integrate existing intent prediction and low-level planning algorithms. iii) It does not suffer from sparse feedbacks in the action space. We experiment our algorithm in a real-world problem that is non-episodic, and the number of agents and goals can vary over time. Our algorithm is trained in a scene in which aerial robots and humans interact, and tested in a novel scene with a different environment. Experimental results show that our algorithm achieves the best performance and human-like behaviors emerge during the dynamic process. 🧠 核心术语库 [[意图感知 (Intent-aware)]] [[目标空间规划 (Goal Space Planning)]] [[效用函数线性近似]] [[意图信念融合]] [[非周期环境 (Non-episodic)]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出意图感知的多智能体规划框架，在目标空间内最大化预期效用，采用线性函数近似替代传统POMDP建模，并将其他智能体的意图信念显式融入决策过程。 💬 锐评 该方法通过简化为线性效用和意图信念有效规避了POMDP的维度灾难并保证收敛，但在复杂博弈中的线性假设可能存在表达瓶颈；性能高度依赖外部意图预测模块的精度，且非周期环境下的跨场景泛化能力仍需验证。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: A Recipe for Stable Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
MARL.short_review: 突破性地解决了离线MARL中因非线性和值分解导致的训练不稳定问题，但方法对复杂场景的泛化性未充分验证；提出的SVN技术简洁有效，可能掩盖了部分动态环境下的适应性挑战。
MARL.full_note: A Recipe for Stable Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Dongsu Lee, Daehee Lee, Amy Zhang 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-09 13:57:08 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08399v1 🧾 一句话总结： 通过规范化技术破解离线多智能体强化学习的训练瓶颈，为实际应用提供可复现的稳定训练框架。 📄 摘要： Despite remarkable achievements in single-agent offline reinforcement learning (RL), multi-agent RL (MARL) has struggled to adopt this paradigm, largely persisting with on-policy training and self-play from scratch. One reason for this gap comes from the instability of non-linear value decomposition, leading prior works to avoid complex mixing networks in favor of linear value decomposition (e.g., VDN) with value regularization used in single-agent setups. In this work, we analyze the source of instability in non-linear value decomposition within the offline MARL setting. Our observations confirm that they induce value-scale amplification and unstable optimization. To alleviate this, we propose a simple technique, scale-invariant value normalization (SVN), that stabilizes actor-critic training without altering the Bellman fixed point. Empirically, we examine the interaction among key components of offline MARL (e.g., value decomposition, value learning, and policy extraction) and derive a practical recipe that unlocks its full potential. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Offline MARL]] [[Non-linear Value Decomposition]] [[Scale-Invariant Value Normalization (SVN)]] [[Value-regularized Linear Mixing]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出Scale-Invariant Value Normalization (SVN) 技术，通过稳定Actor-Critic训练避免价值尺度放大问题；分析非线性价值分解在离线MARL中的不稳定性根源（Bellman固定点偏移与优化波动），结合关键组件交互实验得出实践配方。 💬 锐评 突破性地解决了离线MARL中因非线性和值分解导致的训练不稳定问题，但方法对复杂场景的泛化性未充分验证；提出的SVN技术简洁有效，可能掩盖了部分动态环境下的适应性挑战。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Strategically Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation
MARL.short_review: 理论界定了理性与稳健性的帕累托前沿，但参数调节需依赖先验知识；线性近似虽提升可扩展性，可能牺牲复杂交互的策略拟合精度；‘纳什极限恢复’意味着非理想工况下与传统强基准存在差距，且风险敏感机制在极端对抗场景下可能存在过度保守倾向。
MARL.full_note: Strategically Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 值得看 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Jake Gonzales, Max Horwitz, Eric Mazumdar, Lillian J. Ratliff 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-10 05:24:10 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.09208v1 🧾 一句话总结： 该研究提出一种基于线性近似的 RQRE 计算方法，在保障收敛效率的同时实现了优于纳什均衡的多智能体博弈跨场景鲁棒性。 📄 摘要： Provably efficient and robust equilibrium computation in general-sum Markov games remains a core challenge in multi-agent reinforcement learning. Nash equilibrium is computationally intractable in general and brittle due to equilibrium multiplicity and sensitivity to approximation error. We study Risk-Sensitive Quantal Response Equilibrium (RQRE), which yields a unique, smooth solution under bounded rationality and risk sensitivity. We propose \texttt{RQRE-OVI}, an optimistic value iteration algorithm for computing RQRE with linear function approximation in large or continuous state spaces. Through finite-sample regret analysis, we establish convergence and explicitly characterize how sample complexity scales with rationality and risk-sensitivity parameters. The regret bounds reveal a quantitative tradeoff: increasing rationality tightens regret, while risk sensitivity induces regularization that enhances stability and robustness. This exposes a Pareto frontier between expected performance and robustness, with Nash recovered in the limit of perfect rationality and risk neutrality. We further show that the RQRE policy map is Lipschitz continuous in estimated payoffs, unlike Nash, and RQRE admits a distributionally robust optimization interpretation. Empirically, we demonstrate that \texttt{RQRE-OVI} achieves competitive performance under self-play while producing substantially more robust behavior under cross-play compared to Nash-based approaches. These results suggest \texttt{RQRE-OVI} offers a principled, scalable, and tunable path for equilibrium learning with improved robustness and generalization. 🧠 核心术语库 [[Risk-Sensitive Quantal Response Equilibrium (RQRE)]] [[Optimistic Value Iteration (OVI)]] [[Linear Function Approximation]] [[Finite-sample Regret Analysis]] [[Distributionally Robust Optimization]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 RQRE-OVI 算法，结合乐观价值迭代（OVI）与线性函数近似，在一般和博弈中计算风险敏感量应均衡（RQRE），并通过有限样本后悔分析证明收敛性与复杂度边界。 💬 锐评 理论界定了理性与稳健性的帕累托前沿，但参数调节需依赖先验知识；线性近似虽提升可扩展性，可能牺牲复杂交互的策略拟合精度；‘纳什极限恢复’意味着非理想工况下与传统强基准存在差距，且风险敏感机制在极端对抗场景下可能存在过度保守倾向。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。

MARL.title: Octopus-inspired Distributed Control for Soft Robotic Arms: A Graph Neural Network-Based Attention Policy with Environmental Interaction
MARL.short_review: 该工作在接触富集场景下显著优于传统 MARL 基线，验证了局部接触信息路由对鲁棒协调的有效性。然而，其依赖特定的 Cosserat-rod 仿真器（PyElastica），真实世界物理迁移性未证；且‘无全局几何’虽降低感知负担，但可能增加局部推理计算的复杂度。CTDE 框架在训练阶段仍需集中计算资源，限制了其在超大规模动态系统上的可扩展性潜力。
MARL.full_note: Octopus-inspired Distributed Control for Soft Robotic Arms: A Graph Neural Network-Based Attention Policy with Environmental Interaction 🆕 入库阶段： 首次运行（冷启动） 🔥 推荐指数： 必读 📂 分类： MARL 👤 作者： Linxin Hou, Qirui Wu, Zhihang Qin, Yongxin Guo, Cecilia Laschi 🕒 arXiv上传时间： 2026-03-10 19:56:07 UTC 🔗 原文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10198v1 🧾 一句话总结： 本文通过引入基于图注意力的 GNN 策略与 CTDE 框架，解决了软机械臂在无全局地图信息下的高阶接触控制问题，并在复杂障碍场景中展现出优于主流 MARL 方法的鲁棒性与性能。 📄 摘要： This paper proposes SoftGM, an octopus-inspired distributed control architecture for segmented soft robotic arms that learn to reach targets in contact-rich environments using online obstacle discovery without relying on global obstacle geometry. SoftGM formulates each arm section as a cooperative agent and represents the arm-environment interaction as a graph. SoftGM uses a two-stage graph attention message passing scheme following a Centralised Training Decentralised Execution (CTDE) paradigm with a centralised critic and decentralised actor. We evaluate SoftGM in a Cosserat-rod simulator (PyElastica) across three tasks that increase the complexity of the environment: obstacle-free, structured obstacles, and a wall-with-hole scenario. Compared with six widely used MARL baselines (IDDPG, IPPO, ISAC, MADDPG, MAPPO, MASAC) under identical information content and training conditions, SoftGM matches strong CTDE methods in simpler settings and achieves the best performance in the wall-with-hole task. Robustness tests with observation noise, single-section actuation failure, and transient disturbances show that SoftGM preserves success while keeping control effort bounded, indicating resilient coordination driven by selective contact-relevant information routing. 🧠 核心术语库 [[SoftGM]] [[段化软机械臂]] [[协同智能体]] [[图神经网络注意力策略]] [[中心化训练去中心化执行 (CTDE)]] [[Cosserat-rod 仿真器]] 🔬 核心方法简述 提出 SoftGM 架构，将软机械臂分段建模为协同智能体，构建手臂 - 环境交互图。采用中心化训练去中心化执行（CTDE）范式，结合中心化 Critic 与分散式 Actor，利用两阶段图注意力消息传递机制进行策略优化，无需全局障碍物几何信息即可实现接触富集环境下的在线障碍发现与控制。 💬 锐评 该工作在接触富集场景下显著优于传统 MARL 基线，验证了局部接触信息路由对鲁棒协调的有效性。然而，其依赖特定的 Cosserat-rod 仿真器（PyElastica），真实世界物理迁移性未证；且‘无全局几何’虽降低感知负担，但可能增加局部推理计算的复杂度。CTDE 框架在训练阶段仍需集中计算资源，限制了其在超大规模动态系统上的可扩展性潜力。 📝 说明： 该条目在冷启动阶段按关键词检索后完成单篇深读分析，后续增量任务将继续进行相关性对比与深度比较。
